title: Mock Multimodal Paper
abstract: This paper proposes a grounded multimodal presentation pipeline for academic papers.

sections.title: Abstract
sections.text: This paper proposes a grounded multimodal presentation pipeline for academic papers.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.text: The paper motivates controllable and grounded slide generation for research communication.

sections.title: Method
sections.text: The method combines parsing, asset extraction, grounded slide writing, and PPTX generation.

sections.title: Experiments
sections.text: Experiments evaluate mock-mode generation and inspect artifact quality.

sections.title: Results
sections.text: Results show grounded editable decks and more useful figure-aware slides.

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.text: The work concludes that personalized paper-to-PPT generation is feasible in local-first mode.
